sentence_reviews.text: Neural fields represent continuous signals with coordinate-conditioned networks; radiance fields specialize this idea to view-dependent three-dimensional density and color.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: Mildenhall et al. 2020 NeRF represents scenes as a continuous 5D function of spatial location and viewing direction, outputting volume density and view-dependent emitted radiance/color.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported for NeRF/radiance fields; neural fields broader term is consistent with coordinate-conditioned networks.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Neural fields & radiance-field models is to connect Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings, Reparameterization & differentiable sampling to downstream capabilities including Drug discovery, protein & molecular design.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: NeRF supports coordinate encodings and differentiable volume rendering/sampling; packet sources do not address drug or molecular design.
sentence_reviews.notes: Core technical dependencies are supported; downstream drug/protein design is not.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Drug discovery, protein & molecular design
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: NeRF source concerns novel view synthesis of scenes, not drug discovery, proteins, or molecular design.
sentence_reviews.notes: No adequate packet evidence for this downstream claim.

sentence_reviews.text: combined with Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: NeRF uses input 5D coordinates and positional encoding to represent high-frequency scene content.

sentence_reviews.text: Its inductive bias, data demand, optimization behavior, and compute profile can make it unsuitable outside the regimes where it was validated. Its direct dependencies include Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings, Reparameterization & differentiable sampling.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: NeRF supports positional encodings and differentiable volume rendering; the generic suitability limitation is not directly cited.
sentence_reviews.notes: Dependencies are supported; the limitation is generic atlas wording.

sentence_reviews.text: Neural fields & radiance-field models consumes, emits, or organizes information using Positional, temporal & coordinate encodings.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: NeRF uses spatial coordinates, viewing directions, and positional encoding.

sentence_reviews.text: Neural fields & radiance-field models is assembled in part from the mechanism or model component Reparameterization & differentiable sampling.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: NeRF optimizes by differentiable volume rendering over sampled camera rays/points.
sentence_reviews.notes: Differentiable rendering/sampling is core to NeRF training.

sentence_reviews.text: Neural fields & radiance-field models consumes, emits, or organizes information using Images, video & spatial grids.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: NeRF learns from posed input images and represents 3D scenes for view synthesis.
sentence_reviews.notes: Image/spatial data use is supported; 'spatial grids' is an atlas label and NeRF itself is continuous rather than grid-based.

sentence_reviews.text: Neural fields & radiance-field models extends or specializes the architecture family Multilayer perceptrons.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: NeRF represents the scene with a fully connected deep network/MLP mapping coordinates to density and color.
sentence_reviews.notes: Directly supported for NeRF-style radiance fields.

edge_reviews.notes: Coordinate/positional encodings are core in NeRF.
Differentiable sampled volume rendering directly supports a core composes edge.
Input images and 3D scene coordinates support spatial representation; common strength is appropriate because neural fields are continuous rather than grid-native.
The NeRF model is an MLP/fully connected network, supporting a common specializes edge.
